html:
2026-0431
2026-05-08PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 290, Newfoundland and LabradorProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 290 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Newfoundland and Labrador with respect to interface fires that occurred in Newfoundland and Labrador, in August 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 290, Newfoundland and Labrador
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 290 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Newfoundland and Labrador with respect to interface fires that occurred in Newfoundland and Labrador, in August 2025.
